summary: Completed comprehensive testing after critical bug fixes. Backend APIs working perfectly (14/14 tests passed). Both critical bugs successfully resolved: 1) CORS cookie settings fixed - authentication now persists across navigation, 2) Route ordering fixed - product detail pages and API endpoints working correctly. Minor issue with add to cart functionality remains.

ui_bugs.issue: Add to cart button clicks successfully but items are not being added to cart (cart remains empty)

passed_tests: Backend API endpoints all working (14/14 tests passed)
Product detail page loads correctly when clicking from homepage
Authentication state persists across page navigation (FIXED)
Cart page accessible after login without 'Please login' message (FIXED)
Admin dashboard accessible after admin login
Route ordering fixed - /api/products/{product_id} works for specific products
Product information displays correctly (name, price, images, sizes, colors)
Size and color selection functionality works
Add to cart button is clickable and responsive
CORS cookie settings working - httpOnly cookies with secure=True, samesite=none
Homepage loads with product links and navigation
Product detail page shows correct product information and pricing
action_item_for_main_agent: Investigate add to cart functionality - button clicks but items not being added to cart. Check frontend-backend integration for cart/add endpoint and ensure proper request/response handling.
